title: Broaden manual category fetch
description: Fetch and classify all premium-scope and correction rows by adjustment_type, including PREMI TIKET, PUPUK/TABUR variants, and KOREKSI PANEN/POTONGAN_KOTOR. Edit external backend endpoint if it filters too narrowly.
convergence: PREMI TIKET remains grouped/fetchable and runnable.
PREMI ANGKUT PUPUK or tabur-pupuk descriptions classify as premium-scope.
KOREKSI PANEN classifies as potongan/koreksi and preserves metadata detail rows.
Every PREMI_CATEGORY_KEYS entry triggers grouped premium fetch when category-specific run starts.
Backend by-api-key returns all names for adjustment_type=PREMI or adjustment_type=POTONGAN_KOTOR without requiring adjustment_name.
